case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. THOMAS MARCOUX ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
